prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete a specific defense corpus task identified as 'missing_or_auxiliary_overreach' with the number 4.

tasks.requirement_name: Identify and document missing or auxiliary overreach in the defense corpus.
tasks.description: Analyze the defense corpus to identify instances where content is either missing or involves auxiliary overreach, as defined by the task.

expected_artifacts: Report on identified missing or auxiliary overreach in defense corpus
List of affected sections or documents

required_artifacts: Report on identified missing or auxiliary overreach in defense corpus
List of affected sections or documents

tasks.requirement_name: Validate and confirm the presence of missing or auxiliary overreach.
tasks.description: Validate the integrity of the defense corpus to ensure that all required content is present and that there are no instances of auxiliary overreach.

expected_artifacts: Validation report confirming or denying missing or auxiliary overreach
List of validated sections or documents

required_artifacts: Validation report confirming or denying missing or auxiliary overreach
List of validated sections or documents

tasks.requirement_name: Generate a mitigation plan for identified missing or auxiliary overreach.
tasks.description: Create a detailed mitigation plan to address any instances of missing or auxiliary overreach in the defense corpus.

expected_artifacts: Mitigation plan for missing or auxiliary overreach

required_artifacts: Mitigation plan for missing or auxiliary overreach
